message:
Add needsRefresh helper and comprehensive token refresh tests

Extends the credentials module with better testing for automatic token refresh:

## New Function: needsRefresh()

Added `needsRefresh(creds)` as a semantic alias for `isExpired()`:
- Returns true if token is expired or will expire within 5 minutes
- Provides clearer API for callers checking if refresh is needed
- Same behavior as isExpired() but with more descriptive name

## New Tests for Token Refresh (credentials.test.ts)

Added 6 new tests for the automatic token refresh feature:

### needsRefresh tests:
- Verifies it returns same result as isExpired (alias behavior)
- Tests both expired and valid credentials

### getAccessToken with refresh tests:
- "attempts refresh when token is expired with refresh_token"
  - Mocks fetch to simulate /api/cli/token/refresh endpoint
  - Verifies refresh endpoint is called
  - Verifies new token is returned
  - Verifies new credentials are saved to disk

- "returns null when refresh fails with non-200 response"
  - Tests 401 Unauthorized response handling
  - Verifies graceful failure returns null

- "returns null when refresh fails with network error"
  - Tests network error handling
  - Verifies exception is caught and null returned

- "returns null when no refresh_token and token is expired"
  - Tests case where refresh_token is undefined
  - Verifies no refresh attempt is made

- "keeps old refresh token if server doesn't return new one"
  - Tests response that omits refresh_token
  - Verifies original refresh_token is preserved in saved credentials

## Test Infrastructure

- Uses globalThis.fetch mocking for network isolation
- Cleans up fetch mock in afterEach (already in place)
- Tests verify both return values and side effects (saved credentials)

Files changed:
- packages/cli/src/lib/credentials.ts (+8 lines)
- packages/cli/__tests__/lib/credentials.test.ts (+217 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
